basics.name: Seifeddine LARGAT
basics.label: IT Consultant
basics.summary: I've been a design and development consultant for over 6 years, specializing in Web stacks. Today, I work with major accounts as a technical team leader, to establish guidelines and best practices, to define objectives for production start-up, for evolutionary maintenance, in technical decision-making processes, to design cloud architectures, to add a healthy dose of automation.

volunteer.summary: Global movement of free coding clubs for young people.
Non-profit organization dedicated to teaching children how to code.
highlights: Developed curriculum for beginners to advanced students
Mentored a team of students who won a national coding competition

skills.name: Web Development
skills.summary: Experience with Matlab, Blender, Solidworks, Unity, Python, Java, C, C++, CSS, Javascript, HTML, Adobe Premiere for VR film, Adobe Photoshop; with eagerness to keep improving and learning new technologies

skills.name: UI Design
skills.summary: Highly skilled in UI design with a strong understanding of design principles, user experience, and industry-standard tools. Proficient in creating visually appealing and user-friendly interfaces for web and mobile applications.

references.name: Mohamed Kammoun
references.reference: Seifeddine is one of the best people I had as a partner! We've joined our hands on several projects for nearly two years. He is the consummate professional and an expert diplomat, with such excellent communication skills he was able to navigate even the most tense discussions with grace. He knows how to help his pairs and get the best out of them. Seifeddine was always reliable and professional, and at stressful times he was a positive influence on all of us. I witnessed Seifeddine's commitment to his role firsthand, and I recommend him without hesitation.

references.name: hamdi ben tiba
references.reference: Seifeddine was a great professional to work with! We worked together at Lookiimobile and he helped me a lot to get started and also to understand internal processes. He had such a remarkable ability to tackle any problem but with a warm smile! One of the most profound person I have met! Good job! Keep it up! ✨

references.name: Saifeddinne MATTALAH
references.position: Full Stack Developer | Building Scalable & High-Performance Apps with React, Laravel, & Node.js
references.reference: It was a pleasure working and collaborating with Seifeddine on a daily basis at Lookiimobile. Apart from a deep technical knowledge and strong expérience, he has the ability to explain issues thoroughly, and also formulate potential solutions quickly. Looking forward working with him again

references.name: Thomas Popielski
references.position: Air Liquide Product Owner | Co-fondateur MAE - un réseau d'experts pour tous
references.reference: Seifeddine a été un atout précieux dans notre équipe chez Air Liquide pendant 2 ans. C'est quelqu'un qui sait se rendre disponible et sa réactivité était très appréciée, il a su gérer des situations urgentes, apportant des solutions rapides et fiables. Je recommande vivement Seifeddine pour son professionnalisme et son esprit d'équipe !

references.name: Ahmed Ben Taleb
references.position: Tech maverick | Executive MBA candidate | Co-Founder
references.reference: Seif is one of the best developers I worked with. He has the ability to adapt and deliver a good quality code in short timelines with a great skill of quick analysis and solution oriented. All the projects in which he participated were a success and compliant to the market standards.

references.name: Gustave NGANGO
references.position: AWS Solutions Architect & Lead, Coach DevOps – AWS Community Builder - Linkedin Instructor
references.reference: J'ai eu la possibilité de travailler avec Seifeddine sur plusieurs projets web à Engie IT. C'est un très bon développeur, sûrement l'un des meilleurs avec qui j'ai travaillé. Capable de réfléchir rapidement, très travailleur, Intuitif et à l'écoute, il a toujours été le facteur clé de la réussite des différents projets. L'avoir dans son équipe est un vrai plus.

projects.name: Rosyboa
projects.description: Rosyboa is a neuroscience-based productivity tool for innovative teams. Information overload affects many people's performance and wellness at work. We help teams focus on getting things done using action-driven conversations. Rosyboa is the only team collaboration tool that doubles up as a collective brain, turning conversations into stories.

projects.name: Mycena Business
projects.description: Mycena Pro is a password management app for iOs and Android. Companies can create an account online and subscribe their companies and employees to Mycena Pro, allowing each user to create their own password fortress with three levels of security.

projects.name: Mycena Individual
projects.description: Mycena is a password security solution for organisations holding sensitive information. 81% of breaches are linked to weak/stolen passwords. We help employees use strong passwords by default and store them locally and securely. Mycena is the only Identity and Access Management solution with a fully distributed risk model - where everyone keeps their keys secure in their pocket.
highlights: Passwords encrypted and saved locally on device, NOT on the cloud.
Three levels of security for different sensitivity passwords
Access with finger print/ pin, lock pattern, face ID or voice passphrase

projects.name: MyCena Web Extension (Chrome / Firefox)
projects.description: MyCena web extension allows you to copy and paste passwords from your mobile to the desktop.
highlights: Useful for: When you want to use a login and password on the desktop, you don't have to type it. Go to your MyCena app and touch to copy. Then click the field and select Paste.
When you want to copy a login or password from your desktop onto your MyCena mobile app. On your desktop, select and copy the text. Then touch and select paste on your MyCena mobile app.
